source: VidIQ outliers — top VTuber Shorts by breakout score (last 3 months)
note: Real titles from proven breakout VTuber Shorts. The analyzer uses `templates` as reference shapes for suggestTitles, and `high_performers` as inspiration when the user asks for examples. Refresh weekly via scheduled task.

this_vtuber.description: The 'This VTuber X' open-loop pattern — establishes that something specific + surprising is about to happen. Strongest single shape in the VTuber Shorts niche.
patterns: This VTuber will {action} for the content!?
real_examples: This VTuber Customization Option Is Insane
This Voice Actress is Becoming a VTuber!
This VTuber will bark for the content!?
This VTuber prefers being what!?
This VTuber went BALD!
This vtuber SUCKS man
This VTuber Just Became Lost Media. We Have Lost History

vtuber_statement.description: Declarative '{VTuber} {action}' shape — like reporting an event the viewer NEEDS to see. The single highest-volume category this week.
real_examples: Vtuber Design Controversy!!
vtuber can't be stopped... lamar gta5
A Vtuber Voice Actor?!
VTuber Finds New Science In Subnautica 2?!
VTuber drama gets completely out of hand
Vtuber Is A Martial Artist?!
VTuber realized what this could mean?
VTuber has a CREEPY experience
Vtuber encounters a wild Warwick
WD-40 could KILL a VTuber
Sinder Might ACTUALLY Be The Smartest Vtuber

how_to.description: Tutorial / how-to shape — strong for educational + setup content. Direct, scannable, highly searchable.
patterns: How to Set Up {feature} for Vtuber Models
HOW TO BE A {niche} VTUBER TUTORIAL
real_examples: How to Make a Vtuber Speak Sign Language
How to Set Up Hand Toggles for Vtuber Models
How I Use The Former Bird App
HOW TO BE A SIMRACING VTUBER TUTORIAL
Vtubers EXPLAINED for dummies!

pov.description: POV framing — relatability winner on Shorts/TikTok. Viewer self-identifies before they click.
patterns: POV you're about to {action} but it goes wrong
real_examples: Pov: making with vtuber move is your job!

curiosity_gap.description: Open-loop curiosity — viewer can't resist clicking to find out.
patterns: What no one tells you about {topic}
real_examples: Nobody Can Guess Where This VTuber Is From…
What even is Vtuber physics?
NEVER show their FINAL FORMS
Midwestern VTuber has a secret obsession
Lots of Vtubers do this

comparison.description: 'X vs Y' framing — invites debate, drives comments.
real_examples: Male vs Female VTuber Energy
Cheap vs Expensive VTuber Designs!

shock_reaction.description: Strong emotional reaction or punchy single-phrase hook — 'I'm SCARED', exclamations, two-word meme captions. Massive breakout potential when the clip carries it.
real_examples: FACE VERIFICATION
I'm SCARED
Good Luck
Touch Grass
Evil Advisor
Unfortunate

setup_tutorial.description: Budget / setup content — proven CTR with concrete numbers and gear advice.
patterns: Build a Full VTuber Setup for UNDER ${amount}!
You CAN Have TOO MUCH {thing} on a VTuber Model
real_examples: Build a Full VTuber Setup for UNDER $80!
You CAN Have TOO MUCH Motion on a VTuber Model
How to Set Up Hand Toggles for Vtuber Models

self_deprecating.description: Humble / honest framing — viewers love a creator being real about the grind or their own flaws.
patterns: My VTuber {asset} is {flaw}… But It Somehow Works
Vtuber {activity} is not for the weak
real_examples: My VTuber Design is Lazy… But It Somehow Works 💀
Vtuber model making is not for the weak 🫩

face_or_reveal.description: Reveal-style — face reveal, behind-the-scenes, identity drops.
patterns: How I Accidentally Became a VTuber
real_examples: Face Reveal AND How I Control My Vtuber
How I Accidentally Became a VTuber

origin_story.description: NEW this week — the 'how/why I became a VTuber' origin hook. Personal, identity-driven, and recurring across 3+ breakouts. Pairs storytime energy with a built-in open loop (viewers stay to hear the journey).
patterns: How I Accidentally Became a VTuber
real_examples: WHY I BECAME A VTUBER
How I Accidentally Became a VTuber
This Voice Actress is Becoming a VTuber!
